race.comment: DRAGON FISH (7) is racing well and is close to a win, the latest effort a solid second here after she left herself with a fair bit to do when straightening. No tougher this time and is drawn much kinder. Bold showing anticipated. AQUAFOX (1) was popular in betting last time out but was below his best when finishing fifth. Finds another suitable race and is worth forgiving. OFFA'S DYKE (5) finds it hard to get off the mark but has efforts littered through his form that can measure up. Can blend into it nicely from his middle draw. EMPRESS JUPITER (10) has her first start for the Lynch camp and should finds this a fair bit easier. 2kg claim gets her in light. Worth keeping in mind.
